tone_examples: Quick one — IPL match nights have been 1.5x your weekday avg this season
Spotted: 'biryani delivery' searches in your sublocality up 28% this week

offer_catalog.title: Birthday: Free Cake on parties of 6+

digest.title: IPL home-match Saturdays underperformed weeknight matches across metros
digest.summary: Saturday IPL matches shift orders to home-watch parties; restaurant covers down 12% vs Saturday average. Weeknight matches drive +18% covers. Adjust promo days accordingly.
digest.actionable: Push match-night combos on Tue/Wed/Thu match dates only

digest.title: GST council clarifies 5% rate for restaurant takeaway packaging from 2026-06-01
digest.summary: Single-use plastic surcharge added to packaging cost for orders >₹500. Effective June 1. Cloud kitchens hit hardest.
digest.actionable: Audit your packaging cost; consider Eco-pack alternative if volume justifies

digest.title: Zomato 'verified' badge correlates with +24% impressions in Tier-1 cities
digest.summary: Verification requires uploaded GST cert + 6 months continuous operation. Most eligible mid-size restaurants haven't applied; 5-day approval.
digest.actionable: Apply via partner dashboard if you've crossed 6 months

digest.title: Swiggy iCare: AI complaint summarizer launching Apr 2026
digest.summary: Auto-summarises customer complaints into themes (cold food / late / wrong order). Free for Pro merchants. Reveals pattern most operators miss.
digest.actionable: Enable in dashboard; review weekly themes Sunday evening

digest.title: 'Sugar-free dessert' searches +52% YoY across Indian metros
digest.summary: Concentrated in 28-45 age band; correlated with rising diabetic awareness. Two new options on dessert menus seeing strong attach rate: keto cheesecake, almond-flour brownie.
digest.actionable: Add one sugar-free dessert; mark prominently on menu and GBP

patient_content_library.title: Three things to look for before ordering food online
patient_content_library.body: (1) Look at the latest review's date — if last review is 30+ days old, the kitchen may be off. (2) Filter for 4★+ reviews mentioning your specific dish. (3) Order at peak hours — fresh prep, not warmed-up morning batch. These three filter out 80% of bad-experience risk.

patient_content_library.title: Why a ₹149 thali is the best lunch deal in town
patient_content_library.body: A weekday thali for ₹149 covers your daily protein, two veggies, dal, rice, roti, and pickle/sweet. Buying these separately at any market in the neighbourhood: ₹240+. The only way restaurants make this work is high lunch volume — which means freshly-cooked, not standing in a chafer.

seasonal_beats.note: IPL season — match-night promos on Tue/Wed/Thu; not weekends
Christmas + New Year — set menu sales 3x baseline
monsoon delivery surge; rain-day discount window
Valentine's prix-fixe — book starting 2 weeks prior
